name: haproxy
tagline: A high performance load balancer and reverse proxy for TCP and HTTP traffic
description: HAProxy is a high-performance TCP/HTTP load balancer and reverse proxy server designed for high availability and scalability. Commonly used in production to expose microservices and secure backend connections.

features.title: Load Balancing
features.description: Distributes incoming network traffic across multiple backend services

features.title: Reverse Proxy
features.description: Routes client requests to internal services based on rules

features.title: Traffic Statistics
features.description: Exposes metrics about connections and requests

features.title: Configuration Files
features.description: Defines routing and behavior using configuration files

features.title: Self-Hosted Networking
features.description: Run HAProxy on your own servers
